audit_items.proof_trace: The for loop at L58-60 iterates strictly from i=0 to i<calls.length with ++i, guaranteeing sequential order calls[0]→calls[n-1]. EVM execution is single-threaded and `_call` is synchronous, so no reordering is possible. The `calls` parameter is passed as memory (a local copy), so callees cannot mutate the array to change iteration order.
